title: 雨に踊れば、風邪となる

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: T.M. Opera O and I are having a meeting, when...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
My apologies. It seems yesterday has left a
lingering effect on me.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
En route to the academy, I found myself in the
rain's sweet embrace. I indulged said opportunity
until I arrived at the dorm.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
The exhibition we wove together was both
magical and rife with passion...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Even now, my head still spins from the
spectacle—the heat pulsing through my whole
being!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Oh, how I wish you could have seen it, Trainer!
Haaah ha ha ha—

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She's definitely caught a cold. I send her home to
get some rest.
